name: testPendingOccursAtMostOnceInLifecycle
description: Check that the 'Pending' occurs at most once in the Payment lifecycle section
descriptionHtml: Check that the 'Pending' occurs at most once in the Payment lifecycle section

steps.name: Navigate to '/' endpoint
Login to the site as '0708.061234.24.super@email.com'
Enter the user's email in the 'Email' field
Enter the user's password in the 'Password' field
Press 'Login' button

testStage.description: Check that the 'Pending' occurs at most once in the Payment lifecycle section

steps.name: Click on 'Transactions' menu in Header
Set start and end date: 07-07-2025 to 07-07-2025
Select 'CompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' company using filter
Select 'MerchantCompanyForTestRunOnly Inc.' business unit using filter
Click on the transaction NPGW reference
Verify: Statuses in the dialog header and lifecycle are the same
Verify: The Payment lifecycle begins with 'INITIATED'
Verify: The 'INITIATED' occurs exactly once in the lifecycle
Verify: the 'PENDING' occurs at most once
Click on the 'Close' icon to close form
Click on the transaction NPGW reference

Verify: The Payment lifecycle begins with 'INITIATED'
Verify: The 'INITIATED' occurs exactly once in the lifecycle
Verify: the 'PENDING' occurs at most once
